name: Umbral Rending
descrip: Powerful Erotic magic that arouses your target. Can Charm.
outcome: [AttackerName] lunges forward with wild swipes of her claws tearing through open air, sending crackling streaks of inky black magic in wide arcs at [TargetName], and [TargetHeOrShe] is struck dead on by the scything arcane waves, which send disorienting pleasure surging erratically thought [TargetHisOrHer] entire body, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] twitching and gasping.
miss: [AttackerName] lunges forward with wild swipes of her claws tearing through open air, sending crackling streaks of inky black magic in wide arcs at [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] narrowly avoids the onslaught!
statusOutcome: The magic arcs across [TargetName]'s skin, leaving [TargetHisOrHer] body seizing up from the pleasurable jolts cascading through [TargetHimOrHer]!
